chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ يُشْرِكُ قَرَابَتَهُ وَ إِخْوَتَهُ فِي حَجَّتِهِ أَوْ يَصِلُهُمْ بِحَجَّةٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The one who participates his relatives and his brethren in his Hajj, or he links them with Hajj

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/231)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/231)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ أَنَا بِالْمَدِينَةِ بَعْدَ مَا رَجَعْتُ مِنْ مَكَّةَ إِنِّي أَرَدْتُ أَنْ أَحُجَّ عَنِ ابْنَتِي قَالَ فَاجْعَلْ ذَلِكَ لَهَا الْآنَ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Al Haris Bin Al Mugheira who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, and I was in Al-Medina after having had returned from Makkah, ‘I intend to perform Hajj on behalf of my daughter’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘So make that to be for her, now’.
en.sarwar: 5. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali from Hammad ibn ‘Uthaman from al- Harith ibn al-Mughirah who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, in al-Madinah after my return from Makkah that I wanted to assign my al-Hajj for my daughter. He (the Imam) said, ‘Assign it for her now.’”
